---
title: "Robinson Block — May 22 onward"
site: workflowr::wflow_site
output:
  workflowr::wflow_html:
    toc: true
editor_options:
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(reticulate)
```

This block begins May 22 (afternoon). Analysis will be added here as work progresses.
